series_metadata.series_description: Documents pertaining to all state contracts, whether negotiated or solicited competitively, including, but not limited to: Request to Purchase, Release and Permit requests, the RFP/ITB, checklists, scoring, submitted proposals/bids, contract amendments, performance bonds, insurance information, Complaint to Vendor/Exception, Protest files.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: In office life of contract, destroyed scanned. ; Electronic: On network drive or in OhioBuys 8 calendar years expiration of contract
